name: SCC_CreateCableCheckReq_ISO
title: SCC_CreateCableCheckReq_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateCableCheckReq_ISO ( byte SessionID[], byte StatusFlags[], char ErrorCode[] )
description: Creates a Cable Check Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
